label: F-009: Phases 007/008 (opencode-gpt, 2026-06-30) reference .opencode/commands/goal.md which does not exist; shipped file is opencode_goal.md. Cross-phase doc drift corroborating F-005/F-007/F-008.

F-010: Phase 006 (active-continuation) tasks.md claims completion_pct=100 but frontmatter open_questions=[Live one-shot session.idle observability] and completion criteria documents a live serve/TUI idle-smoke gap. Core idle auto-continuation path only unit-tested, never live-verified.

F-012: All eight in-scope phase tasks.md stamp session_dedup.fingerprint = sha256:0000...0000 (placeholder). Continuity freshness/content-hash integrity effectively disabled packet-wide; completion claims unverifiable under CONTINUITY_FRESHNESS.
O-003: Multi-agent handoff boundary (codex phases 001-006, opencode-gpt phases 007-008) coincides with the goal.md filename-drift introduction. No shared ground-truth file check bridged the handoff.

O-004: Phase 008 deliverables confirmed present on disk: goal_plugin.md, feature_catalog/18--ux-hooks/goal-opencode-plugin.md, manual_testing_playbook/18--ux-hooks/goal-opencode-plugin.md. Naming wrinkle: references/hooks uses underscore (goal_plugin.md) vs catalog/playbook hyphens. ENV_REFERENCE MK_GOAL_* not yet re-verified.
Phases 001, 002, 004, 005 are clean at the task level: all tasks [x], 100%, no open questions, test files referenced and consistent.

reason: Phase 006 tasks.md completion_pct=100 is contradicted by its own open_questions and completion-criteria caveat documenting a live idle-smoke gap.
Direct glob of .opencode/commands/* returns only opencode_goal.md, README.txt, prompt.md, agent_router.md. No goal.md. Phases 007/008 cross-reference is to a non-existent file.
